spa.name: Doggy Milk Bath
spa.description: Spoil your pooch with a luxurious milk bath that cleanses, soothes, and softens their skin and coat. This calming and nourishing experience will leave them feeling relaxed and smelling divine.

spa.name: Soothing Mud Bath
spa.description: This mineral-rich mud bath is perfect for dogs with itchy or dry skin. Packed with healing ingredients like aloe vera and oatmeal, it promotes healthy cell regeneration and eases irritation.

spa.name: Shed Safely Mud Bath
spa.description: Reduce shedding and promote a healthy coat with our Shed Safely Mud Bath. This deep-cleaning treatment is infused with omega oils and B vitamins to help relieve and prevent excessive shedding.

spa.name: Green Mud Bath
spa.description: Specially formulated for senior dogs, this antioxidant-rich mud bath revitalises the skin and coat, leaving your older companion feeling refreshed and rejuvenated.

spa.name: Paw Spa
spa.description: Reduce shedding and promote a healthy coat with our Shed Safely Mud Bath. This deep-cleaning treatment is infused with omega oils and B vitamins to help relieve and prevent excessive shedding.
